text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 176 

PART_D_LIS_75 

LABEL: Part D Low Income Subsidy 75% 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount of the Part D low-income subsidy (LIS) where the subsidy level is 
75%. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable has been retired; therefore, the field is blank after 2023. The Inflation Reduction Act of 
2022 expanded
